# Agency Agents External Skill Manifest

Imported from `/Users/xin/Downloads/agency-agents-main (1).zip`.

These files are vendor role-skill references. Do not treat them as autonomous agents by themselves. In this project they are loaded as supporting skill context for LLM-backed project agents.

## Selected Skills

- `agents-orchestrator.md`: orchestration gates, state, quality loop discipline.
- `automation-governance-architect.md`: recurring automation governance, logging, fallback, ownership.
- `product-trend-researcher.md`: market trend and competitive intelligence.
- `product-manager.md`: problem-first product framing, validation before build, metrics.
- `product-sprint-prioritizer.md`: priority, effort, sequencing.
- `finance-investment-researcher.md`: investment-style market/opportunity assessment.
- `sales-discovery-coach.md`: customer discovery and buyer pain validation.
- `sales-pipeline-analyst.md`: pipeline and sales signal interpretation.
- `marketing-growth-hacker.md`: growth experiments and acquisition hypotheses.
- `marketing-china-market-localization-strategist.md`: China localization and channel fit.
- `testing-evidence-collector.md`: evidence-first QA discipline.
- `testing-reality-checker.md`: skepticism against unsupported approvals.
